title: rhododendron × clowesianum
intro: Rhododendron × clowesianum, also known as Clowes rhododendron, is a hybrid rhododendron plant that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation, due to the presence of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rhododendron × clowesianum include its potential in lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or extracting its bioactive compounds, and can be consumed as tea or taken in capsule form.
